---
title: "Formula Sheet (Draft)"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
canvas:
  type: page
  published: false
  indent: 1
---

> **Draft — not yet released to students.** This page is intentionally
> unpublished and indented under *Reference Material*.

## Axial Loading

$$
\sigma = \frac{N}{A}, \qquad \delta = \frac{N L}{A E}.
$$

## Torsion of Circular Shafts

$$
\tau = \frac{T r}{J}, \qquad J = \frac{\pi d^4}{32}, \qquad
\phi = \frac{T L}{G J}.
$$

## Bending

$$
\sigma = \frac{M c}{I}, \qquad I_{\text{rect}} = \frac{b h^3}{12}.
$$

## Quick-Reference Constants

| Quantity | Symbol | Typical value |
|:---------|:-------|:--------------|
| Gravity | $g$ | $9.81\ \text{m/s}^2$ |
| Steel modulus | $E$ | $200\ \text{GPa}$ |
| Steel shear modulus | $G$ | $79\ \text{GPa}$ |

See the [Stress & Strain page](02_Stress_and_Strain.qmd) for derivations.
